name: Janua
description: Janua is a fork of Apache Guacamole focused on modern Wayland remote desktops. Its guacd is built against a pinned, tested FreeRDP 3 with patches enabling full GNOME Remote Desktop compatibility (Graphics Pipeline + audio via RDPSND v8), H.264/AVC for KDE KRdp, and an RDPGFX surface-sync fix — clientless browser access to GNOME and KDE Wayland desktops, plus everything upstream Guacamole connects to.

notes.text: First install compiles FreeRDP and the patched guacd from source and takes 10-20 minutes. Do not interrupt the process.
A random admin password is generated during installation and shown once in the install output. Save it — it is not stored anywhere.
